appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/workspace-state.md` to document that the training-data builder now defaults `weather_fetcher` to `fetch_game_weather()` across the normal rebuild path and that `_fill_missing_feature_values()` now uses leakage-safe feature-family defaults instead of full-dataset column means.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `ml-worker` manual-verification guidance is too rigid for narrow ML wiring and regression fixes.
rejectedObservations.reason: already recommended in `.factory/validation/ml-pipeline/scrutiny/synthesis.round1.json`; this rerun review only reinforced the same systemic point

rerunContext.note: Round-2 blocking issues for `fix-t16-feature-integration` were re-reviewed through the targeted fix feature `fix-t16-weather-missing-imputation`, which passed without new blockers.
